meta.description: MendLab is a premier science-driven wellness and physical recovery lab in Cairo, offering advanced recovery protocols, physical rehabilitation, therapeutic massage, cupping therapy (Hijama), and dry needling.

hero.title: Recover Smarter. Perform Better.
hero.subtitle: MendLab bridges advanced sports science and traditional therapy to optimize your physical restoration, performance, and overall well-being.

mission.title: Recovery, redefined by science
mission.body: To redefine the recovery landscape in Cairo by delivering premium, hygienic, and scientifically backed physical restoration services — while ensuring a comfortable, empowering, and results-driven experience for every client.

why.title: Why Choose MendLab
why.subtitle: Recovery here is not simply a treatment — it is a structured, evidence-based process designed to help you restore, perform, and thrive.

items.title: Science-Driven Protocols
items.body: Every treatment follows structured, evidence-based recovery science.

items.title: Advanced Sports Rehab
items.body: Built on modern sports rehabilitation principles and practice.

items.title: Premium Clinical Space
items.body: A refined, professionally managed clinical environment.

items.title: Exceptional Hygiene
items.body: Sterile, single-use protocols and meticulous cleanliness.

items.title: Athlete-Focused Care
items.body: Specialized services for athletes and active lifestyles.

items.title: Dedicated Female Sector
items.body: A private, dedicated recovery sector for women.

items.title: Evidence-Based Methods
items.body: Treatment methodologies grounded in current research.

items.title: Personalized Programs
items.body: Recovery plans tailored to your body, goals, and history.

servicesPreview.title: Our Services

cta.title: Ready to feel the difference?
cta.subtitle: Book your first session at MendLab and start recovering the smart way.

services.title: Recovery & Cupping Sessions
services.subtitle: Targeted sessions priced by body area — choose the upper body, lower body, or a full whole-body reset.

recovery.name: Recovery Sessions
recovery.description: Targeted recovery sessions to relieve pain, reduce muscle tension, and improve mobility.

cupping.name: Cupping Sessions
cupping.description: Traditional cupping therapy to improve circulation, detoxify the body and reduce pain.

services.priceNote: Prices may vary depending on the duration and specific treatment plan.
services.note: Our sessions are customized to your needs. Final price may vary depending on the duration and therapist recommendation.

recovery-upper-body.name: Upper Body
recovery-upper-body.short: Neck, shoulders, upper back, arms and hands.
recovery-upper-body.description: A targeted recovery session for the upper body — neck, shoulders, upper back, arms and hands. Built to relieve pain, reduce muscle tension, and improve mobility where training load and daily posture accumulate most.
howItWorks: A short assessment identifies tight and overloaded areas.
Targeted manual techniques treat the neck, shoulders, upper back, arms and hands.
Pressure and duration are tailored to your needs and your therapist's recommendation.
The session closes with mobility work and simple guidance for home.

recovery-lower-body.name: Lower Body
recovery-lower-body.short: Lower back, hips, glutes, legs and feet.
recovery-lower-body.description: A targeted recovery session for the lower body — lower back, hips, glutes, legs and feet. Ideal after heavy training or long days on your feet, it relieves pain, reduces muscle tension, and restores mobility.
howItWorks: A short assessment identifies tight and overloaded areas.
Targeted manual techniques treat the lower back, hips, glutes, legs and feet.
Pressure and duration are tailored to your needs and your therapist's recommendation.
The session closes with mobility work and simple guidance for home.

recovery-whole-body.name: Whole Body
recovery-whole-body.short: Full body recovery session for complete relief and balance.
recovery-whole-body.description: A complete full-body recovery session covering both the upper and lower body for total relief and balance — our most comprehensive option for restoring how you move and feel.
howItWorks: A full assessment maps tension and mobility across the whole body.
Upper and lower body are treated within one structured session.
Pressure and duration are tailored to your needs and your therapist's recommendation.
The session closes with mobility work and simple guidance for home.

cupping-upper-body.name: Upper Body
cupping-upper-body.short: Neck, shoulders, upper back, arms and hands.
cupping-upper-body.description: Traditional cupping therapy across the upper body — neck, shoulders, upper back, arms and hands — to improve circulation, support detoxification, and reduce pain.
howItWorks: Your therapist assesses the area and prepares the skin under strict hygiene.
Cups are applied across the neck, shoulders, upper back, arms and hands.
Suction is adjusted to your comfort and held for the appropriate time.
Cups are removed, and the area is cleaned and assessed.

cupping-lower-body.name: Lower Body
cupping-lower-body.short: Lower back, hips, glutes, legs and feet.
cupping-lower-body.description: Traditional cupping therapy across the lower body — lower back, hips, glutes, legs and feet — to improve circulation, support detoxification, and reduce pain.
howItWorks: Your therapist assesses the area and prepares the skin under strict hygiene.
Cups are applied across the lower back, hips, glutes, legs and feet.
Suction is adjusted to your comfort and held for the appropriate time.
Cups are removed, and the area is cleaned and assessed.

cupping-whole-body.name: Whole Body
cupping-whole-body.short: Full body cupping session for maximum benefits.
cupping-whole-body.description: A complete full-body cupping session covering both the upper and lower body for maximum benefits — circulation, detoxification, and pain relief from head to toe.
howItWorks: Your therapist assesses the whole body and prepares the skin under strict hygiene.
Cups are applied systematically across the upper and lower body.
Suction is adjusted to your comfort and held for the appropriate time.
Cups are removed, and the treated areas are cleaned and assessed.

about.title: Where sports science meets traditional therapy
about.intro: MendLab is a premier science-driven wellness and physical recovery lab based in Cairo, Egypt. Founded to bridge the gap between advanced sports science and traditional therapeutic practices, we deliver evidence-based recovery solutions designed to optimize physical restoration, performance, and overall well-being.

story.title: Our Story
story.body: MendLab specializes in advanced recovery protocols, physical rehabilitation, therapeutic massage, and specialized cupping therapy (Hijama) — serving athletes, fitness enthusiasts, and individuals seeking high-quality recovery and wellness services. Every treatment is delivered within a premium, highly hygienic, and professionally managed clinical environment that prioritizes safety, effectiveness, and client comfort.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: To redefine the recovery landscape in Cairo by delivering premium, hygienic, and scientifically backed physical restoration services — while ensuring a comfortable, empowering, and results-driven experience for every client.

items.title: Evidence First
items.body: We follow the science, not trends.

items.title: Personal Care
items.body: Programs built around you, not a template.

items.title: Genuine Results
items.body: We measure success by how you feel and move.

leadership.title: Leadership
leadership.name: Ahmed Hosny
leadership.bio: Ahmed Hosny is the CEO and Founder of MendLab. With an academic background in Physical Therapy and a strong foundation in sports science and physical rehabilitation, he established MendLab with a vision of modernizing traditional therapeutic practices through evidence-based methodologies. His work integrates contemporary sports recovery science with traditional wellness approaches — including Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) and advanced cupping therapy — drawing on extensive knowledge of muscle plasticity, recovery science, performance optimization, and plyometric training mechanisms. Passionate about sports performance and sports marketing, he develops targeted recovery strategies and educational content that help competitive athletes, fitness enthusiasts, and everyday clients achieve optimal physical restoration and performance.
